mapper.sql: select id, session_id, paper_id, parent_paper_id, paper_level, answer_mode, paper_weight, sort_no, paper_status, start_time, submit_time, score, correct_rate from sc_exam_session_paper
mapper.insert: insert into sc_exam_session_paper(session_id, paper_id, parent_paper_id, paper_level, answer_mode, paper_weight, sort_no, paper_status, start_time, submit_time, score, correct_rate, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{sessionId}, #{paperId}, #{parentPaperId}, #{paperLevel}, #{answerMode}, #{paperWeight}, #{sortNo}, #{paperStatus}, #{startTime}, #{submitTime}, #{score}, #{correctRate}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
